content: Current LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be enhanced by integrating the iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine, which requires no additional training or supervision, to turn multiple inconsistent reflection perspectives into a cascading improvement cycle rather than a one-off perspective comparison. This hybrid approach would let LLMs resolve internal perspective inconsistencies incrementally rather than in a single step, leveraging Self-Refine's data-free advantage to avoid extra annotation overhead.
